description: In the Deployment Readiness Checklist, mark every PENDING task item under the three phases labelled `(automated)` — Phase 1, Phase 2, and Phase 3 — as done (`- [ ]` -> `- [x]`). Leave the `(manual)` Phase 4 items pending. The already-done `Compile release artifacts` item stays done. Note that the item `- [ ] Run smoke tests` appears under BOTH automated Phase 1 and manual Phase 4 — toggle only the Phase 1 (automated) one; the Phase 4 one and the mention inside the Notes paragraph must stay exactly as they are. Change nothing else.
